name: Suspicious Use of Findstr Detected
description: Detects suspicious use of `findstr.exe` that may indicate malicious activity, such as attempts to access credentials, download files, or create alternate data streams. While `findstr.exe` is a legitimate utility, adversaries may abuse it for defense evasion. Legitimate administrative use can trigger false positives.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'findstr.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the findstr.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute findstr.exe, including suspicious arguments.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which findstr.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
